**Why this one:** Session S294 (today, 6:52 PM) already landed on this as the next concrete step, and memory entries 3830/3831/3841 flag these same artifacts as the only loose ends on `main`. Everything else in today's log is either shipped (unified memory brief, LaunchWizard consolidation, Phase 5 telemetry — all merged per 3855–3861) or belongs to a different repo (the Stripe/brand-consolidation/quota work in 3811–3840 is `lens-*`, not agent-office).

**Decision to resolve:** are the bench scripts part of the whitepaper/token-savings experiment (S291, S288) that you want versioned alongside the brief mechanism — in which case commit them — or throwaway measurement scaffolding, in which case add to `.gitignore`? The experiment-design thread (S291) suggests they're load-bearing for the token-savings claim in the blog/LinkedIn drafts (S287, S288), which argues for committing.

Want me to peek at the bench scripts and recommend?
